title: Electric Fly Zapper - Electronic Bug Zapper with Protective net Layer - Pest Control Mosquito and Insect Catcher Racket - Electric Fly Swatter - Handy Killer Racket for Indoor and Outdoor
features: 🗲🗲 PRODUCT DETAILS - Fly Swatter Zapper Racket operates with 2x AA Batteries (not included) and has dimensions of 44CM x 17CM.
🗲🗲 ELIMINATE BUGS & FLIES INSTANTLY - Featuring 3 layers of mesh protection, it ensures maximum safety even for children, yet shows no mercy to bugs. An incredibly effective tool for pest control!

🗲🗲 PORTABLE DEFENSE: Lightweight and compact, this zapper is an outdoor essential. Perfect for backyard gatherings, BBQs, camping, and hiking, it ensures you're always ready to tackle those pesky insects.

🗲🗲 COMFORTABLE HANDLING: Designed with an ergonomic and lightweight build, our racket offers a comfortable grip and precise control. Easily target and eliminate bugs with quick results and minimal mess.

🗲🗲 SIMPLE TO OPERATE: Just press and hold the button to use, and release to automatically turn off the power. User-friendly and safe for you and your family. Note: Keep out of reach of babies and small children!
description: Product Description High-Density Electric Grid for Instant Insect Control Experience the power of our high-density electric grid that kills insects instantly, providing you with an effortless and effective solution to keep your home pest-free. Designed for convenience, this tool ensures your living space remains comfortable and free of annoying bugs.
